title: The Mystery of the Lost Leonardo

scenes.text: A masterpiece vanished without a trace from a museum.
The 'Salvator Mundi' disappeared from the Louvre in 2011.
Leonardo da Vinci’s painting, valued at over $450 million, was stolen amidst controversy.
It remains one of the most expensive paintings ever lost.
scenes.label: MYSTERY STILL EXISTS

scenes.text: Follow if you'd have cracked this one.

description: 📍 Florence, Italy - 2011. The renowned 'Salvator Mundi' vanished from the Louvre and has never been recovered. It remains the most valuable lost artwork in history. Follow for daily cold cases!
